summary: Etapa 4 Teacher (B2C) accounts — backend pytest 13/15 passing + comprehensive frontend E2E. Two real backend issues found: (1) teacher token causes 500 on admin endpoint instead of 401/403/422, (2) brute-force lockout never returns 429 over the public ingress (identifier-IP rotation). All teacher frontend pages/testids/tabs/favorites/logout/redirect/catalog heart icons + toast + catalog-detail pill verified working.

critical.issue: Sending a valid teacher_token in Authorization Bearer header returns 500 KeyError: 'user_id' (logged in /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log at routes/auth.py:444 `current_user["user_id"]`). Expected 401/403/422 per the requirement that admin code paths must reject teacher tokens. Root cause: core/security.get_current_user does NOT verify `account_type` on the JWT — it accepts any signed token whose payload it can decode, then admin route code crashes on missing user_id.

After 5 wrong-password attempts the next valid login STILL returns 200, never 429. Likely root cause: identifier is `${request.client.host}:${email}`. Behind the Kubernetes ingress, request.client.host returns the immediate proxy IP which rotates between requests, so the failed_count is split across many TeacherLoginAttempt rows and never crosses LOCKOUT_THRESHOLD=5 for any single identifier. Fix: parse X-Forwarded-For first-IP, or key the lockout on email alone (with a small per-IP fallback).

integration_issues.issue: Could not reach step 4 of /booking/669e71b2-a8e7-4eb0-ac13-8b8c4f3107a5 to visually confirm prefill toast 'Údaje byly předvyplněny z vašeho účtu' — Test Muzeum still has zero bookable calendar days (same blocker as iteration 65). Code-level review confirms BookingPage.js imports useTeacherAuth and contains the auto-prefill effect with teacherPrefilledRef guard, and teacher login + cookie + /api/teacher/auth/me chain all work, so the prefill should fire when step 4 is reachable.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option> — caused by the 'Made with Emergent' x-ve-dynamic wrapper, NOT by Etapa 4 code. Pre-existing, non-blocking.

action_items: FIX (HIGH): In core/security.get_current_user, reject tokens where payload.get('account_type') == 'teacher' OR where 'user_id' is missing — return 401 'Tento token nepatří administrátorovi' instead of letting routes crash with KeyError.

FIX (HIGH): Replace identifier=`${request.client.host}:${email}` in routes/teacher.py login with one of: (a) email-only key with a separate per-IP throttle, or (b) parse X-Forwarded-For first IP via a helper. Currently lockout never triggers behind the ingress.
Optional: seed at least one bookable date for Test Muzeum (669e71b2-a8e7-4eb0-ac13-8b8c4f3107a5) so the BookingPage step-4 prefill can be E2E-verified in future iterations (carry-over from iter65).
critical_code_review_comments: routes/teacher.py:248 — identifier='${ip}:${email}' won't accumulate behind a reverse proxy because request.client.host is the proxy IP per-connection. Always read X-Forwarded-For (first hop) when behind ingress.

core/security.get_current_user must explicitly reject account_type='teacher' tokens. Currently it silently passes them through and downstream code crashes with KeyError → 500 (information leak + bad UX).

routes/teacher.py:204 _reset_attempts only deletes by identifier, but if identifier rotates (see above) old rows accumulate forever. After fixing the identifier, also add a periodic cleanup of stale TeacherLoginAttempt rows (>24h).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of testable flows (booking step-4 blocked by seed data, not by code)

test_credentials: Admin: demo@budezivo.cz / Demo2026!. Teacher: any new register via POST /api/teacher/auth/register or /ucitel/registrace works.
seed_data_creation: Test created ~12 ephemeral teacher accounts via POST /api/teacher/auth/register with email prefix 'test_t_' and 'test_e2e_' — no admin endpoint to bulk-delete them; recommend a Supabase cleanup query: DELETE FROM teacher_accounts WHERE email LIKE 'test_t_%' OR email LIKE 'test_e2e_%'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher endpoints all wired correctly: register/login set HttpOnly teacher_token cookie, account_type='teacher' on JWT, profile dict has access_token, password_hash never returned, PATCH /me persists, favorites add+idempotent+list-with-embedded-program-data+delete all work, /api/teacher/bookings returns [] for new teacher, GET /api/public/catalog?limit=3 returns dict with 'items' key not raw list. Frontend pages all have correct data-testids: teacher-register-page/login-page/account-page, teacher-tab-favorites/history/profile, teacher-favorites-empty, teacher-history-empty, teacher-profile-save, teacher-logout-btn. Catalog cards have favorite-icon-{program_id}, detail page has favorite-pill-{program_id}. Logged-out heart click shows toast 'Pro uložení do oblíbených se přihlaste' without navigating. Admin login route is /login (NOT /admin/login as stated in review request). Two BACKEND issues remain: (1) teacher token → 500 on admin /api/auth/me, (2) lockout 429 never fires behind ingress.
rca of the issue: (1) Admin token leakage 500: routes/auth.py:444 reads current_user['user_id'] but current_user dict came from JWT payload; teacher-issued JWT lacks user_id → KeyError. The validator function in core/security.get_current_user does not branch on account_type. Fix: in get_current_user, raise HTTPException(401) when payload.get('account_type') == 'teacher' or 'user_id' not in payload. (2) Lockout 429: behind Kubernetes ingress request.client.host is the proxy IP and changes per request (different proxy replicas), so identifier `${ip}:${email}` is different each time and failed_count never reaches threshold for any single row. Reproduction: 5 wrong-pw attempts to /api/teacher/auth/login from same client → next correct attempt still returns 200. Fix: trust X-Forwarded-For (first IP), or key on email alone for the lockout column.
